'''FGA-583 nerve agent''' was a highly effective [[Nerve toxin/Legends|nerve toxin]] that was commonly loaded into [[Type-12B Hollow-Tip Rocket]]s. When used, the toxin could induce unconsciousness in a target in less than six [[Standard second|seconds]].<ref name="EGWT" />
